evidence.claim:
PubMed ID: 39456591. 2024/10/16 00:00. PURPOSE: This guideline provides evidence-based recommendations on the use of 
postmastectomy radiation therapy (PMRT) in the treatment of breast cancer. PMRT 
r
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 39456591. 2024/10/16 00:00. PURPOSE: This guideline provides evidence-based recommendations on the use of 
postmastectomy radiation therapy (PMRT) in the treatment of breast cancer. PMRT 
refers to the treatment of the chest wall and ipsilateral regional nodes, 
including at-risk axillary, supra/infraclavicular, and internal mammary nodes. 
Updated recommendations detail indications for PMRT in the upfront surgical 
setting and after neoadjuvant systemic therapy, and provide guidance
